headline: Sandisk (SNDK) Stock Faces A June 22 Share Swap And AI Memory Test
summary: Western Digital plans to complete a SanDisk share swap on June 22, further separating the two businesses. The transaction is set to leave Sandisk, ticker NasdaqGS:SNDK, operating as a pure-play NAND and SSD company. Sandisk is in an AI-driven memory upcycle, supported by strong AI-related demand, tight supply and multi-year contract wins. For investors tracking Sandisk, NasdaqGS:SNDK, the timing of this share swap matters. The stock has moved sharply, with the share price at $1,991.55 and...
